top_signals.title: Accredited official statistics: HM Treasury: 2026 COVID-19 Cost Tracker update
top_signals.summary: Official Statistics on the cost of measures announced in response to the COVID-19 pandemic and how much the government has spent on these measures so far.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Piero Cipollone: Money in the digital age
Ashmore Bets on Mexico’s Booming Pension Funds With Equity Fund
top_signals.summary: Ashmore Group is launching a Mexican equities fund as it looks to capitalize on investments by the country’s rapidly growing pension fund system.

top_signals.title: Most planned natural gas pipeline capacity additions in 2026 and 2027 originate in Texas
top_signals.summary: Developers plan to bring approximately 44.9 billion cubic feet per day (Bcf/d) of new pipeline capacity online in the United States in 2026 and 2027, according to our latest Natural Gas Pipeline Projects Tracker. Approximately 70% (31.6 Bcf/d) of this new capacity is already under construction. More than 66% (29.7 Bcf/d) of the capacity additions originate in Texas. Louisiana is second with 19% (8.4 Bcf/d) of total capacity additions.
